meaning: n.一天的旅程,(美国南部,墨西哥的)荒漠地带
examples: Jornada del Muerto - An interlude. Kind of depressing because I was looking forward to this song a lot.
I decided to write a program on my old Jornada 525 Pocket PC to send the correct codes to the TV using the IR port.
Apart from a few kanji-character machines made for the Japanese domestic market, there is nothing available today that could take the Jornada 720's place.
The clean-roomers killed the HP Jornada handheld in favor of the Compaq iPAQ .
However, while the Cassiopeia is a very nice unit, I still prefer the Jornada for everyday use.
